title: Frames Next Gen
description: The mod greatly expands interaction with frames, allowing you to take buildings and gameplay to the next level.
body:
The mod allows you to improve interaction with frameworks, as well as expand their functionality, while remaining within the vanilla framework.

All parameters are customizable. The mod allows you to click through frames and signs, if the player is not crouched, and make frames with inserted objects invisible. 

The main feature is the ability to configure the global displacement of an object within a frame along all three axes, as well as the ability to specify the local displacement of a specific object by renaming it according to a specific template. 

More details can be seen in the screenshots. 

All changes will work on any server and players who also have this mod installed will see them.
